title: Time of Day
description: Time of the day at which the variable or parameter is observed or simulated by a model.

definitions.definition: Time of the day at which the variable or parameter is observed or simulated by a model.
definitions.notes: - In Remote Sensing it is also known as time of overpass.
definitions.examples:
| Type      | Entry format example | Valid unit |
|-----------|----------------------|------------|
| timestamp | 18:00 h (0–24)       | Hours      |
| timerange | 18:00 – 20:00 h      | Hours      |
